Building Scalable Drupal Sites

Drupal is a powerful content management system that scales to enterprise needs. In this article, we explore best practices for building large-scale Drupal implementations.

Key Considerations

  • Database optimization
  • Caching strategies
  • Content architecture
  • Performance monitoring

When building for scale, you need to think about how your site will handle growth. This means considering database queries, cache hit rates, and content delivery strategies from the beginning.
